text_raw: People say they spotted the Jackals prowling around.
text_clean: People say they spotted the Jackals prowling around.

text_raw: They're likely holed up somewhere close.
text_clean: They're likely holed up somewhere close.

text_raw: there's not a single Black Bear to be found.
text_clean: there's not a single Black Bear to be found.

text_raw: It seems to me they've stopped working together.
text_clean: It seems to me they've stopped working together.

text_raw: That makes sense, seeing as only Jackals remain in the area.
text_clean: That makes sense, seeing as only Jackals remain in the area.

text_raw: Well, if they've really split up, all the better for us. Eh?
text_clean: Well, if they've really split up, all the better for us. Eh?

text_raw: You lot take Myurdin, we'll go after {StaticInfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Ludvig#Ludvig}.
text_clean: You lot take Myurdin, we'll go after {StaticInfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Ludvig#Ludvig}.

text_raw: So, what do you think, Oongka? What do we do?
text_clean: So, what do you think, Oongka? What do we do?

text_raw: Can't just hunt down one and not the other.
text_clean: Can't just hunt down one and not the other.

text_raw: Bunch of Jackals just tore through here.
text_clean: Bunch of Jackals just tore through here.

text_raw: Ah, there's one of your comrades.
text_clean: Ah, there's one of your comrades.

text_raw: No need to waste too many of ours on a pack of fucking Jackals, is there?
text_clean: No need to waste too many of ours on a pack of fucking Jackals, is there?

text_raw: The Jackals just came out of nowhere... Tore the place apart.
text_clean: The Jackals just came out of nowhere... Tore the place apart.

text_raw: Scared me half to death! I crawled like a dog...
text_clean: Scared me half to death! I crawled like a dog...

text_raw: Solumen's shade... my legs still won't stop shaking.
text_clean: Solumen's shade... my legs still won't stop shaking.

text_raw: Y-yeah... one of them stood out! Had a bloody stump for a hand.
text_clean: Y-yeah... one of them stood out! Had a bloody stump for a hand.

text_raw: Was still swinging his sword like mad... Never seen anything like it.
text_clean: Was still swinging his sword like mad... Never seen anything like it.

text_raw: No... no... I was too busy hiding... too scared to look.
text_clean: No... no... I was too busy hiding... too scared to look.

text_raw: Did you see where he went?
text_clean: Did you see where he went?

text_raw: Shame. Was hoping that took your head.
text_clean: Shame. Was hoping that took your head.

text_raw: See the little gift I left on the road?
text_clean: See the little gift I left on the road?

text_raw: Nothing I say is going to change your mind, is it?
text_clean: Nothing I say is going to change your mind, is it?

text_raw: He promised me all of Pailune...
text_clean: He promised me all of Pailune...

text_raw: if I... removed an obstacle for him...!
text_clean: if I... removed an obstacle for him...!

text_raw: So the Jackals could finally outshine the Greymanes...
text_clean: So the Jackals could finally outshine the Greymanes...

text_raw: if you fuckers had just stayed away!
text_clean: if you fuckers had just stayed away!

text_raw: I spared them a life of wretched servitude!
text_clean: I spared them a life of wretched servitude!

text_raw: I'll give you the same gift I gave them!
text_clean: I'll give you the same gift I gave them!

text_raw: I can't wait to see Kliff's face...
text_clean: I can't wait to see Kliff's face...

text_raw: when I send him the head of his precious pet orc!
text_clean: when I send him the head of his precious pet orc!

text_raw: You had a hand... in Jian's death?
text_clean: You had a hand... in Jian's death?

text_raw: Not worth listening to your rambling.
text_clean: Not worth listening to your rambling.
